data.body:
Old PC games can be extremely janky, but sometimes the jank comes from modern hardware, modern windows, sketchy no-CD patches, and even your specific setup. 
So please think before you make blanket statements about the quality of a PC game from 2001, especially when running it on a PC from 2026
